question: The chart shows regional internet usage statistics (2020-2025). Which of the following statements is supported by the data shown?

options.A: Asia Pacific has the highest internet usage among the regions shown.
options.B: North America has the lowest internet usage among the regions shown.
options.C: Latin America and North America have identical internet usage.
options.D: Middle East has higher internet usage than Latin America.

explanation: This bar chart uses dual encoding: the same value is shown with bar height, bar width, and color intensity. That combination exaggerates differences and can make moderate gaps look much larger. The reliable conclusion is the correct option based on the numeric labels/data.
